ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the product sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold in the transaction */,
  "invoice_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the transaction occurred */,
  "unit_price" TEXT /* Price per unit of the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the transaction occurred */,
  "total" TEXT /* Total price of the transaction */,
  "code_no" INTEGER /* Additional identifier for the transaction */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the transaction occurred */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who processed the transaction */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Currency code for the transaction */,
  "tax_amount" TEXT /* Tax amount for the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used for the transaction */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_currency_code FOREIGN KEY ("currency_code") REFERENCES currency_rates ("currency_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_code_no FOREIGN KEY ("code_no") REFERENCES transaction_codes ("code_no"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_transactions_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES products ("stock_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "price" TEXT /* Unit price of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the supplier of the product */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-keeping unit for the product */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the product is currently active */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date the product was added to the inventory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Shipping address of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "last_purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the customer's last purchase */,
  "total_spent" TEXT /* Total amount spent by the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  "prefers_email" INTEGER /* Indicates if the customer prefers email communications */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the category is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_categories_parent_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity_on_hand" INTEGER /* Current quantity of the product in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Level at which a new order should be placed */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the inventory is located */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the inventory was last updated */,
  "min_stock_level" INTEGER /* Minimum stock level for reorder alerts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_stock_code FOREIGN KEY ("stock_code") REFERENCES products ("stock_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "returns" (
  "return_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each return */,
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the original transaction */,
  "stock_code" TEXT /* Reference to the product being returned */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product being returned */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was returned */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Amount refunded for the return */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the employee who processed the return */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the return */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the return (e.g., pending, approved, refunded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("return_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_transaction_id FOREIGN KEY ("transaction_id") REFERENCES sales_transactions ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_returns_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "employee_name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the employee within the company */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the store where the employee works */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the employee was hired */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the employee is currently active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the employee's last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the employee (e.g., cashier, manager, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the manager of the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the store */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the store is currently active */,
  "manager_email" TEXT /* Email of the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currency_rates" (
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code for the currency */,
  "exchange_rate" TEXT /* Exchange rate to the base currency */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the rate was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the currency rate is currently active */,
  "base_currency_code" TEXT /* Base currency code for the exchange rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "transaction_codes" (
  "code_no" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("code_no")
)
